commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Protected draft PR with missing contributor proof and compatibility/security-boundary decisions; maintainers should review the stack and proof rather than queue an automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete code-level security regression was found; the diff reuses the existing redactor and does not print credential values, but the secret-bearing path still needs real behavior proof. (sha=a5d6bc885effdcfc6df9e9e14e9064091a139c85)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a structured doctor health check and dry-run repair effect for historical `config-audit.jsonl` scrub findings, layered on the ordered doctor health contribution stack.

PR surface: Source -17, Tests +649, Docs +2. Total +634 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection shows current main has the legacy scrub path, while the PR adds the structured lint/dry-run exposure that needs real CLI proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected draft PR with missing contributor proof and compatibility/security-boundary decisions; maintainers should review the stack and proof rather than queue an automated repair.

target.title: Doctor: expose config audit scrub findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes config audit scrub needs as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for rewriting historical `config-audit.jsonl` argv/execArgv records through the current redactor.
- Keeps the existing `maybeScrubConfigAuditLog` path authoritative for real normal `doctor` / `doctor --fix` behavior, including the append-race abort guard.
- Declares the structured check inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution path.

This is intentionally the config-audit scrub slice from the doctor repair stack. It does not change config audit logging, redaction behavior for new records, or gateway runtime behavior.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627, current base head `bd1000b409d`. The only new config-audit commit in this PR is signed head `a5d6bc885e`; the config-audit delta is 4 files.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts` (2 tests)
- `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit-fast src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts` (39 tests)
target.author: giodl73-repo
